description: Queen Patch 16 (15 July 2020) — Android Memory Improvements, Hellgate Warden Reflect Change, Combat Balance Changes (Holy Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Armors).

sections.heading: Improvements
items: [Android] Improved memory handling to increase stability for devices with over 4GB memory

sections.heading: Changes
items: Damage taken from Hellgate Warden and Gatekeeper spells can no longer be reflected
sections.searchable_text: Changes Hellgate Warden Gatekeeper spells damage reflected

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Holy Staffs Flash Heal Quarterstaffs Fatal Blade Armors Self Ignition Specter Jacket

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Flash Heal Base Heal 45 40 AoE Heal 50 30

changes.raw_text: Flash Heal (all Holy Staffs): Base Heal: 45 → 40; AoE Heal: 50 → 30

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Fatal Blade Black Monk Staff Hit Interval 0.5s 0.75s debuff stacks

changes.raw_text: Fatal Blade (Black Monk Staff): Hit Interval: every 0.5s → every 0.75s (debuff stacks more slowly on enemies)
notes: Debuff stacks more slowly on enemies

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Self Ignition Specter Jacket Burn Aura stacked 1 aura Self Damage per tick 3% 2% max health

changes.raw_text: Self Ignition (Specter Jacket): Burn Aura can no longer be stacked — maximum of 1 aura applies to any given target. Self Damage per tick: 3% of max health → 2% of max health
notes: Burn Aura can no longer be stacked — a maximum of 1 aura applies to any given target
